title: Quasar School · Cheatsheets, starter references
description: One-page starter references for Lua, FiveM resources, events, callbacks, ox_lib, ox_target, parameterized SQL, entity cleanup, and the debug checklist. Each card links to the lesson where the concept lives.

title: Entity cleanup cheatsheet · spawn, register, delete on stop · Quasar School
description: One-page reference for entity lifecycle in FiveM: spawn-register-delete pattern, the registry table, DeleteEntity vs SetEntityAsNoLongerNeeded, networked vs local, the onResourceStop sweep, and the leaks that survive a restart.

title: Events cheatsheet · TriggerEvent, server, client, net wrappers · Quasar School
description: One-page reference for FiveM events: TriggerEvent, TriggerServerEvent, TriggerClientEvent, RegisterNetEvent, AddEventHandler, and the secured ox_lib net wrappers.

title: Lua syntax cheatsheet · variables, strings, operators, scope · Quasar School
description: One-page Lua syntax reference for FiveM scripting: local declarations, types, string concatenation with .., comparison and logical operators, scope rules, and the differences between Lua and JavaScript or Python.

title: ox_lib UI cheatsheet · notify, dialog, context, input, progress · Quasar School
description: One-page reference for ox_lib UI primitives: lib.notify, lib.alertDialog, lib.registerContext, lib.inputDialog, and lib.progressBar. Copy-safe shapes for each.

title: ox_target cheatsheet · zone, entity, model, bone, cleanup · Quasar School
description: One-page reference for ox_target in FiveM: addBoxZone, addEntity, addModel, addBone, options shape, icon names, canInteract guards, and the cleanup path on resource stop.

title: oxmysql cheatsheet · parameterized queries, insert, select, update · Quasar School
description: One-page reference for oxmysql in FiveM: insert, select one, select many, update, and delete. Always with question-mark placeholders, never with string concatenation.

title: Resource skeleton cheatsheet · fxmanifest, client, server · Quasar School
description: One-page reference for the minimum FiveM resource layout: fxmanifest.lua fields, folder structure, client_scripts vs server_scripts vs shared_scripts, and the rule for what must never live on the client.

title: Tables cheatsheet · lists, maps, ipairs vs pairs · Quasar School
description: One-page Lua tables reference for FiveM scripting: numeric vs string keys, the difference between ipairs and pairs, sparse-array gotchas, and the patterns for lists, maps, and structs.

title: Expansion modules · Quasar School
description: Production expansion modules for senior FiveM developers: native families, framework patterns, SQL discipline, performance, persistence, and rollback.

description: You will create one logger helper used by every script file.

description: You will track spawned entities and clean them on resource stop.

description: You will read player data on the server and avoid client authority.

description: You will group natives by entity, ped, vehicle, and HUD use.

title: Natives reading checklist - Quasar School Expansion
description: You will read native docs without guessing the side, handle, or expected return.

title: Performance and reliability basics - Quasar School Expansion
description: You will replace a tight loop with a throttled loop.

title: Prop and ped systems - Quasar School Expansion
description: You will store placed object state without trusting client labels.

title: Spec, logging, and rollback plan - Quasar School Expansion
description: You will write a small feature spec before code changes.

title: SQL failures and slow query logs - Quasar School Expansion
description: You will catch SQL failures and log query context.

title: SQL migrations and schema discipline - Quasar School Expansion
description: You will run one versioned migration and verify the schema row.

title: Vehicle persistence base - Quasar School Expansion
description: You will save a vehicle plate with validated server data.

title: Resources · VS Code, FiveM Docs, Natives, and Beginner Tools · Quasar School
description: Beginner-friendly Quasar School resources page with VS Code download links, FiveM extensions, GitHub Desktop, FiveM natives, official docs, and reference links for QBCore, ESX, and CFX scripting.

title: FiveM and Lua error catalog · What console errors mean and how to fix them · Quasar School
description: Searchable catalog of common FiveM server console errors and Lua runtime errors. What each message means, the most likely cause, and the smallest fix.

title: Framework matrix · QBCore vs ESX vs ox_lib side by side · Quasar School
description: Side-by-side comparison of common QBCore, ESX, and ox_lib patterns: player data, money, jobs, notifications, inventory, target, callbacks, and identifiers. Pick the framework you use, see the same task in the others.

title: Install FiveM Scripts Safely · Quasar School
description: A practical FiveM script installation guide for reading provider docs, mapping dependencies, organizing resources, ordering server.cfg, using txAdmin, checking frameworks, and testing assets before launch.

title: Script planning cheatsheet · Plan a FiveM script before you write code · Quasar School
description: A beginner-friendly cheatsheet for planning a FiveM Lua script before you write any code. Spec, architecture, folder setup, server-first code order, and a pinnable 7-step checklist.

description: Run a FiveM server: tools, txAdmin, server.cfg, framework, staff, and QA.

title: Script Templates - Quasar School
description: Copy-paste-safe FiveM starter templates for logging, SQL, events, entities, vehicles, and ox_target.

title: Banking system template - Quasar School
description: Copy-paste-ready FiveM banking resource: deposit, withdraw, and transfer with an NUI menu. Works on ESX and QBCore.

title: Configurable blips template - Quasar School
description: Config-driven FiveM map blips: define every blip in config.lua, spawn them on resource start, and clear them with a command. Copy-safe starter.

title: Debug capture template - Quasar School
description: Structured logs and pcall-based error capture. Stop unsafe work after a failure. Copy-safe FiveM starter.

title: Entity registry template - Quasar School
description: Track every spawned entity by id and clean them up on resource stop. Zero leaks at restart. Copy-safe FiveM starter.

title: Event gateway template - Quasar School
description: Client request, server validation, result event. Copy-safe FiveM starter with parameterized validation and security notes.

title: Map asset QA template - Quasar School
description: A practical QA checklist for maps, MLOs, stream folders, ymap conflicts, collision, and client performance.

title: NUI survey template - Quasar School
description: In-game player survey built with the ox_lib input dialog. A command opens the form, reads the answers, and logs them server-side. Copy-safe FiveM starter.

title: ox_target template - Quasar School
description: Add and remove ox_target options with cleanup. Target selection is presentation, server still validates. Copy-safe FiveM starter.

description: Framework-aware FiveM ped and animation system: chat commands, oxmysql persistence, and client model swapping. Copy-safe starter.

title: Prop interaction template - Quasar School
description: Spawn one prop, prepare one interaction, and clean it up on resource stop. Copy-safe FiveM starter.

title: Resource skeleton template - Quasar School
description: Production-ready FiveM resource skeleton: fxmanifest, shared logger, client and server hooks. Copy-safe starter.

title: Revive command template - Quasar School
description: Copy-paste FiveM revive command: a /revive command that targets a player by ID, validates them server-side, and restores health on the client.

title: SQL save and load template - Quasar School
description: Parameterized oxmysql save and load. Always with ? placeholders. Never with string concatenation. Copy-safe FiveM starter.

title: Teleport command template - Quasar School
description: Copy-paste FiveM teleport command: a /tp command, a table of named locations, and an optional particle effect. Beginner and advanced versions.

description: Copy-paste FiveM player-to-player trade system with an NUI menu. Framework-agnostic item transfer for ESX, QB, ox_inventory, and qs-inventory.

description: Server validates the request, networks the vehicle, client takes ownership and cleans up on stop. Copy-safe FiveM starter.
